products.title: AeroBuds Pro Wireless
products.description: Next-gen noise-cancelling wireless earbuds featuring spatial audio, custom fitting silicone tips, IPX4 sweat resistance, and a smart charging case with up to 36 hours of battery life.

products.title: CyberPunk Tactile Keyboard
products.description: Hot-swappable tactile mechanical keyboard built with premium custom PBT keycaps, dual-mode wireless (2.4Ghz/Bluetooth), and customizable reactive RGB underglow.

products.title: Minimalist Leather Backpack
products.description: Water-resistant, hand-crafted full-grain leather backpack. Features a dedicated 16-inch padded laptop sleeve, secret luggage pass-through, and modular organization compartments.

products.title: GlowSphere Desk Lamp
products.description: Elegant ambient RGB sphere desk light with dimmable natural light controls, smart home integration, and an integrated 15W Qi wireless fast charging base.

products.title: Titanium EDC Bolt Pen
products.description: CNC-machined grade 5 titanium alloy bolt-action writing tool. Designed to last a lifetime, featuring a knurled grip, balanced weight distribution, and Schmidt ink refills.

products.title: Ergonomic Memory Foam Cushion
products.description: Premium orthopedic seat cushion crafted with supportive memory foam. Relieves tailbone pressure, promotes posture correction, and features a breathable mesh cover.
